languages.text: {n}Возможно это лишь блик или отражение от одного из приборов, но вам кажется, что на мгновение луч света озаряет лицо Нунциуса. Его зрачки расширяются, а рука тянется вверх, будто пытаясь коснуться чего-то. Его дыхание становится чище и ровнее. Едва слышно он шепчет:{/n} "Омниссия... я наконец-то... постиг..."

{n}Perhaps it is just a glint or a reflection from one of the devices, but for a moment, a shaft of light seems to illuminate Nuncius's face. His pupils dilate, and his hand reaches up, as if trying to touch something. His breathing becomes clearer and more even. Barely audibly, he whispers:{/n} "Omnissiah... at last... I comprehend..."
languages.original_text: {n}Возможно это лишь блик или отражение от одного из приборов, но вам кажется, что на мгновение луч света озаряет лицо Нунциуса. Его зрачки расширяются, а рука тянется вверх, будто пытаясь коснуться чего-то. Его дыхание становится чище и ровнее. Едва слышно он шепчет:{/n} "Омниссия... я наконец-то... постиг..."

languages.text: {n}Tal vez sea un mero destello, o un reflejo de algún dispositivo de la sala, pero jurarías que el rostro de Nuncius se ha iluminado durante un breve instante. Sus pupilas se dilatan y extiende la mano hacia arriba, como si intentase tocar algo. Su respiración es ahora más relajada y estable. Apenas alcanzas a oírle susurrar:{/n} «Omnissiah... al fin... comprendo...».
languages.original_text: {n}Perhaps it is just a glint or a reflection from one of the devices, but for a moment, a shaft of light seems to illuminate Nuncius's face. His pupils dilate, and his hand reaches up, as if trying to touch something. His breathing becomes clearer and more even. Barely audibly, he whispers:{/n} "Omnissiah... at last... I comprehend..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tal vez sea un mero destello, o un reflejo de algún dispositivo de la sala, pero jurarías que el rostro de Nuncius se ha iluminado durante un breve instante. Sus pupilas se dilatan y extiende la mano hacia arriba, como si intentase tocar algo. Su respiración es ahora más relajada y estable. Apenas alcanzas a oírle susurrar:{/n} «Omnissiah... al fin... comprendo...».

languages.text: {n}也许那只是某台仪器上的微光或反射，但有一瞬间，一束光仿佛照亮了努恩修斯的面容。他的瞳孔放大，手微微抬起，像是在触碰什么。他的呼吸变得清晰平稳了些，气息微弱地低语道：{/n}“欧姆尼赛亚……终于……我领悟了……”
languages.original_text: {n}Perhaps it is just a glint or a reflection from one of the devices, but for a moment, a shaft of light seems to illuminate Nuncius's face. His pupils dilate, and his hand reaches up, as if trying to touch something. His breathing becomes clearer and more even. Barely audibly, he whispers:{/n} "Omnissiah... at last... I comprehend..."

traits.locale_text: {n}也许那只是某台仪器上的微光或反射，但有一瞬间，一束光仿佛照亮了努恩修斯的面容。他的瞳孔放大，手微微抬起，像是在触碰什么。他的呼吸变得清晰平稳了些，气息微弱地低语道：{/n}“欧姆尼赛亚……终于……我领悟了……”

languages.text: {n}Ce n'est peut-être qu'un reflet projeté par l'un des appareils, mais l'espace d'un instant, un faisceau de lumière semble illuminer le visage de Nuncius. Ses pupilles se dilatent et il lève une main, comme s'il essayait de toucher quelque chose. Sa respiration se fait plus régulière et plus facile. Dans un murmure à peine audible, il dit :{/n} « Omnimessie... enfin... Je comprends... »
languages.original_text: {n}Perhaps it is just a glint or a reflection from one of the devices, but for a moment, a shaft of light seems to illuminate Nuncius's face. His pupils dilate, and his hand reaches up, as if trying to touch something. His breathing becomes clearer and more even. Barely audibly, he whispers:{/n} "Omnissiah... at last... I comprehend..."

Ses pupilles se dilatent et il lève une main, comme s'il essayait de toucher quelque chose. Sa respiration se fait plus régulière et plus facile. Dans un murmure à peine audible, il dit :{/n} « Omnimessie... enfin... Je comprends... »

languages.text: {n}Belki de cihazlardan birinden gelen bir parıltı veya yansımadır ama bir an için bir ışık hüzmesi, Nuncius'un yüzünü aydınlatıyor gibi görünüyor. Göz bebekleri büyüyor ve eli, sanki bir şeye dokunmaya çalışıyormuş gibi yukarı uzanıyor. Daha belirgin ve düzenli şekilde nefes alıp veriyor. Zar zor duyulabilir bir şekilde fısıldıyor.{/n} "Hermesih... Sonunda... Anlıyorum..."
languages.original_text: {n}Perhaps it is just a glint or a reflection from one of the devices, but for a moment, a shaft of light seems to illuminate Nuncius's face. His pupils dilate, and his hand reaches up, as if trying to touch something. His breathing becomes clearer and more even. Barely audibly, he whispers:{/n} "Omnissiah... at last... I comprehend..."

Göz bebekleri büyüyor ve eli, sanki bir şeye dokunmaya çalışıyormuş gibi yukarı uzanıyor. Daha belirgin ve düzenli şekilde nefes alıp veriyor. Zar zor duyulabilir bir şekilde fısıldıyor.{/n} "Hermesih... Sonunda... Anlıyorum..."

languages.text: {n}Vielleicht ist es nur ein Funkeln oder eine Reflexion von einem der Geräte, aber für einen kurzen Moment scheint ein Lichtstrahl Nuncius' Gesicht zu erhellen. Seine Pupillen trüben sich und er hebt seine Hand, als wolle er etwas berühren. Seine Atmung wird freier und gleichmäßiger. Er flüstert kaum hörbar:{/n} "Omnissiah ... endlich ... Verstehe ich ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Perhaps it is just a glint or a reflection from one of the devices, but for a moment, a shaft of light seems to illuminate Nuncius's face. His pupils dilate, and his hand reaches up, as if trying to touch something. His breathing becomes clearer and more even. Barely audibly, he whispers:{/n} "Omnissiah... at last... I comprehend..."

Seine Pupillen trüben sich und er hebt seine Hand, als wolle er etwas berühren. Seine Atmung wird freier und gleichmäßiger. Er flüstert kaum hörbar:{/n} "Omnissiah ... endlich ... Verstehe ich ..."

languages.text: {n}単なる光のきらめきか、装置の一つの反射にすぎぬのかもしれない。だが一瞬、一筋の光がヌンキウスの顔を照らし出したように見える。彼の瞳孔が開き、その手が、何かに触れようとするかのように持ち上がる。彼の呼吸は、より澄んで、より穏やかになる。かろうじて聞き取れる声で、彼はささやく。{/n}「オムニッシア……ついに……私は悟った……」
languages.original_text: {n}Perhaps it is just a glint or a reflection from one of the devices, but for a moment, a shaft of light seems to illuminate Nuncius's face.
